description_long: This is a hand-crafted, round plant pot with a thick, rolled rim and a slightly uneven, organic shape. The exterior surface is textured and rough, with visible dimples and irregularities, suggesting it was made from clay or a similar earthen material. The rim is notably thicker and features a subtle, stippled pattern, while the body of the pot is bulbous and tapers gently toward the base. The coloration is a mottled mix of earthy grays and browns, with some lighter and darker patches, giving it a weathered, rustic appearance. There are visible marks and a small break or chip on the rim, as well as some faint writing or numbering on the inside upper edge. The interior is unglazed and appears similarly rough, consistent with traditional pottery techniques.
description: A rustic, hand-crafted clay plant pot with a thick, textured rim and a mottled gray-brown surface. The pot is round, bulbous, and shows signs of age and wear.
description_view_0: The pot is seen from the front, showing the thick, rolled rim and the rough, dimpled surface texture with no visible breaks.
description_view_1: This view reveals a noticeable chip or break in the rim and some faint writing on the inner upper edge.
description_view_2: The pot appears more symmetrical from this angle, with the mottled surface and thick rim clearly visible, but no major damage.
description_view_3: The broken section of the rim and the writing on the inside are most prominent in this view, highlighting the pot's imperfections.
attribute_placement_context: commonly used in rustic outdoor gardens or historical parks
